author: lOrm
content: #655 closed. Added LspServerConfig struct in src/plugins/manifest.rs and lsp_servers field on PluginManifest (rename 'lspServers' for CC parity). Plugin struct now carries lsp_configs HashMap, populated by resolve_lsp_servers() on plugin load. Schema fields: command, args, env, extensions. Binary-on-PATH validation deferred to runtime so plugins can install their server via a post-install hook. 1 unit test pins manifest parsing. Actual pool registration (depends on #647 long-lived server pool) is the runtime follow-up.
